title: The Trailer Graphics
description: Always wanted your Minecraft world to look like the trailers? Well look no further with the 'Minecraft Trailer Graphics' modpack.
body:
Always wanted your Minecraft world to look like the trailers? Well look no further with the 'Minecraft Trailer Graphics' modpack.

This modpack adds the following mods/shaders/resource packs:
- Bare Bones X Fresh Animations (RP)
- Bare Bones (RP)
- Fresh Animations (RP)
- Entity Model Features (MOD)
- Entity Texture Features (MOD)
- Entity Culling (MOD)
- Iris Shaders (MOD)
- Eating Animation (MOD)
- Fabric API (MOD)
- Not Enough Animations (MOD)
- Sodium (MOD)
- BSL Shaders (MOD)

The Basic Fundamentals of the modpack introduces the Minecraft Trailer graphics into your world!

Showcased on my TikTok (Jinkaizen)




REMINDER!
PLACE THE RESOURCE PACKS ACCORDINGLY!
(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b7e44051c3b194ec4fec615d052be899b61bd78.png)
